name: Domain Universe
description:
In This Universe, People attend an awakening where they can awaken domains that give the ability to summon soldiers and there is a 0.1% of awakening a domain someone has written, wage war, and conquer other domains and unclaimed domains.

The awaken classes are A, B, C, D, E, F, S, SS, SSS Special A to SSS, and Chaos A to SSS classes.
creator: Hasako
